auth.title: NYUSH Course Reviews
auth.subtitle: Sign in to browse and post course reviews

hints.netidOnly: Enter your NetID only — the @nyu.edu suffix is fixed

errors.invalidNetid: Invalid NetID (must start with a letter, 2–15 alphanumeric chars)
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.loginFailed: Sign-in failed: incorrect email or password
errors.registerFailed: Registration failed, please try again later

messages.registerSuccess: Registered. Check your inbox to verify, then sign in.
